coupon.source_phrase_block: MELROSE PUBLIC LIBRARY - PADDLE BOSTON SPOT POND PASS: This pass is valid for online reservations and walk-up rentals at Spot Pond , in Stoneham, MA ( valid only for date printed on the pass ) . This pass allows 1 boat rental free of charge at Spot Pond (there are options for boats that will seat more than 1 person). If you are reserving more than 1 boat on your visit, you may need to make a second reservation for the boat(s) not covered by the discount pass. The pass does not include use of sailboats or provide guaranteed parking. You will need to fill out a Float Plan Agreement ONE time per season. Patrons may reserve the pass up to 2 times per month. Reserve your Melrose Public Library pass for desired date. You will receive a confirmation email with an "Access Pass" link (if you do not have an email account, a printed confirmation may be picked up at the Main Desk of the library).
